outlook_rationale: Range-bound regime persists across all instruments. Memorial Day Monday thins liquidity. Iran deal binary event dominates near-term (50/50 odds). Thursday PCE deflator is the next catalyst. No strong directional signal.

XAG-USD.notes: COT positioning extremely light. Hedge funds waiting for $92 breakout. G/S ratio at 57 (below 65-70 mean).

XAU-USD.notes: Last trigger BUY->HOLD flip. Dead neutral (5 buy vs 5 sell). Iran deal is binary: deal = dip to $4400, failure = spike to $4800.

BTC-USD.notes: MVRV Z-Score 0.41 (mid-cycle, not overvalued). RSI oversold territory. 12h BUY phantom proven noise. Saylor signaled willingness to sell BTC.

ETH-USD.notes: ETH/BTC ratio still compressed. No breakout above $2.5K yet. Lower conviction (0.6).

MSTR.notes: Down 64% from ATH. 843K BTC treasury. Saylor policy shift: now willing to sell BTC.

trade_ideas.rationale: Bullish thesis intact ($120 target, 0.8 conviction) but G/S ratio at 57 below mean suggests near-term caution. COT barely positioned - wait for hedge fund re-entry above $92. ATR stops validated.
MVRV Z-Score 0.41 confirms mid-cycle. RSI oversold but 12h BUY phantom is noise. Wait for $85K breakout. Saylor policy shift is bearish micro-catalyst.

system_improvements_implemented: Expanded _SHADOW_SAFE_SIGNALS: 11 OHLCV-only signals added (ttm_squeeze, tsi_chop_mr, amihud_illiquidity_regime, absorption_ratio_regime, trend_slope_momentum, sentiment_extremity_gate, connors_rsi2, adx_regime_switch, choppiness_regime_gate, autotune_adaptive_cycle, bocpd_regime_switch + 2 newly disabled: momentum_factors, btc_proxy). Fixes blind spot where disabled signals had 0 outcome samples.
Formally disabled momentum_factors (30% recent accuracy, 783 sam) and btc_proxy (44.6%, BUY 31.1%).

HMM regime detection for signal selection (high effort, high impact)
Fix macro_external correlation cluster (fear_greed + news_event should not be grouped)
Walk-forward validation framework to prevent small-sample illusions

risk_warnings: Iran deal binary event: 50/50 odds. Deal = risk-on gap. Failure = risk-off gap. No edge in predicting outcome.
Memorial Day Monday: US markets closed, thin liquidity for 24h.
Thursday PCE deflator: core at 3.2% could shift June FOMC expectations.
MSTR: Saylor willingness to sell BTC is a policy shift. May introduce selling pressure.
Avanza session expired since May 23: needs manual BankID re-authentication.
Layer 2 timeout rate high: 14 contract violations this week (triggers without journal entries).
research_highlights: Qwen3 strongest LLM: 59.9% overall, but highly asymmetric (SELL 73%, BUY 33.4%). System correctly gates BUY direction.
drift_regime_gate: 71.5% recent accuracy (651 sam) - strongest recent improvement. Already re-enabled May 22.
28 disabled signals had zero outcome samples due to missing shadow tracking. Fixed by expanding _SHADOW_SAFE_SIGNALS.
COT positioning: hedge funds hold just 5,472 net long silver contracts. Massive room for re-entry above $92.
MVRV Z-Score at 0.41 confirms BTC is mid-cycle, not overvalued. Cycle-top readings are 3.5-4.0.
Gold-silver ratio at 57 (below 65-70 long-term mean) suggests silver is expensive vs gold near-term.
Multi-agent debate (TradingAgents, Apex Quant) shows improved performance over single-agent systems, but our signal ensemble is already a de-facto multi-agent architecture.
